basicDetails.schemeName: Smt. Bimla Rani Memorial Award (B.Sc. Ag., B.V.Sc. & A.H., B.H.Sc. & B.F.Sc.)
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnagar

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Smt. Bimla Rani Memorial Award (B.Sc. Ag., B.V.Sc. & A.H., B.H.Sc. & B.F.Sc.)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), and Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) courses.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), and Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) courses.

children.text: The “Smt. Bimla Rani Memorial Award (B.Sc. Ag., B.V.Sc. & A.H., B.H.Sc. & B.F.Sc.)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), and Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) courses.

Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the payments.

applicationProcess.process_md: Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the payments.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), or Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. 1. The award amount is granted for a duration of one year only.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.

The applicant must be enrolled in the Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), or Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
The award amount is granted for a duration of one year only.
